question.d: a sentence that asks for information
question.e: Can you please answer my question about the homework?

questions.d: Things you ask to get more information
questions.e: The teacher asked the class many questions.

quality.e: The quality of the toy is very high.

quickly.d: Doing something in a fast way
quickly.e: The rabbit ran quickly across the field.

quick.d: Something that happens or is done very fast.
quick.e: The rabbit ran quick across the field.

queen.d: The female leader of a country
queen.e: The queen lives in a big castle.

quarter.d: One of four equal parts of something
quarter.e: I only need a quarter cup of sugar.

quiet.e: The library is a quiet place to read.

quit.e: I will quit playing video games and go to bed.
